title: doria alata
intro: Doria alata, also known as the Golden Ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Doria alata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Doria alata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
